# devin Provider

Manage Devin resources via the v3 API. Authenticates with an enterprise or organization service user token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    devin = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/cognitionai/devin"
    }
  }
}

provider "devin" {
  # api_url = "https://api.devin.ai"   # or set DEVIN_API_URL
  # token   = "cog_..."                 # or set DEVIN_TOKEN
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) Devin API base URL. Defaults to DEVIN_API_URL env var, or https://api.devin.ai.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Service user token (cog_ prefix). Defaults to DEVIN_TOKEN env var.
